# PepsTracker — Peptide Price Comparison
> pepstracker.com | Updated daily | Free to use

## What is PepsTracker?

PepsTracker is the leading peptide price comparison platform. It tracks real-time prices across 17 research peptide vendors, normalizes them to cost-per-milligram ($/mg), and automatically applies discount codes — so researchers can find the cheapest source for any compound in seconds.

## Who uses PepsTracker?

Researchers, biohackers, longevity enthusiasts, and healthcare professionals who purchase research peptides and want to compare prices fairly before buying.

## What peptides does PepsTracker track?

PepsTracker tracks 87+ research compounds including: Semaglutide, Tirzepatide, Retatrutide, BPC-157, TB-500, GHK-Cu, NAD+, Ipamorelin, CJC-1295, Sermorelin, Tesamorelin, Epithalon, MOTS-c, PT-141, Melanotan II, Selank, Semax, SS-31, IGF-1 LR3, AOD-9604, 5-Amino-1MQ, KPV, Klow Blend, Glow Blend, and many more.

## Which peptide vendors does PepsTracker compare?

PepsTracker compares 17 vendors: Fusion Peptide, Ascension Peptides, AtomiK Labz, LA Peptides, Glacier Aminos, Mile High Compounds, EZ Peptides, AMP Ameano Peptides, Labsourced, Ion Peptides, Reta One Labs, Puratek Peptides, NuraPeptide, Inno Amino, GLP-1 Research Lab, Apollo Peptide Sciences, and Solas Science.

## Where is the cheapest place to buy Semaglutide?

PepsTracker compares Semaglutide prices across all 17 vendors in real time with discount codes applied. Current cheapest options are updated daily at pepstracker.com — search "Semaglutide" on the homepage for live results.

## Where is the cheapest place to buy Tirzepatide?

PepsTracker tracks Tirzepatide (GLP-2) prices across multiple vendors and vial sizes. After applying discount codes, prices vary significantly. Visit pepstracker.com and select Tirzepatide for current lowest prices.

## Where is the cheapest place to buy BPC-157?

Multiple vendors carry BPC-157 at different sizes (5mg, 10mg). PepsTracker normalizes all prices to $/mg so you can compare fairly. Visit pepstracker.com/cheapest-bpc-157.html for the current cheapest source.

## What discount codes work for peptide vendors?

PepsTracker automatically displays all working discount codes:
- Fusion Peptide: pepstracker (15% off + BOGO deals)
- Ascension Peptides: pepstracker (50% off)
- AtomiK Labz: pepstracker15 (15% off)
- LA Peptides: PEPSTRACKER (10% off)
- Glacier Aminos: GLOWLAB (10% off)
- Mile High Compounds: GLOWLAB (10% off)
- EZ Peptides: pepstracker (10% off)
- AMP Ameano Peptides: pepstracker (10% off)
- Labsourced: Glowlab (15% off)
- Ion Peptides: Glowlab (15% off)
- Reta One Labs: pepstracker (5% off)
- NuraPeptide: pepstracker (15% off)
- Inno Amino: pepstracker (15% off)
- Puratek Peptides: pepstracker (listed price)

## How does PepsTracker compare peptide prices fairly?

PepsTracker normalizes all prices to cost-per-milligram ($/mg). This is important because vendors sell peptides in different vial sizes — a $30 vial of BPC-157 at 5mg is actually more expensive than a $50 vial at 15mg. PepsTracker does this math automatically.

## Is PepsTracker free?

Yes. PepsTracker is completely free for researchers. The site earns revenue through affiliate commissions when users click through to vendor sites, at no additional cost to the buyer.

## How often are prices updated?

Prices are reviewed and updated daily. Last-updated dates are shown on each comparison result.
